api_key.description: SparkPost API key, sent verbatim as the Authorization header value (no Bearer prefix). Never logged.

base_url.description: SparkPost API base URL. Defaults to the US endpoint; set explicitly to https://api.eu.sparkpost.com/api/v1 for the EU region.

start_date.description: Lower bound sent as the 'from' query parameter.

end_date.description: Upper bound sent as the 'to' query parameter.
